projects.name: Insights on SDG 12 – Responsible Consumption and Production
projects.description: Analyzed global food production and consumption patterns

work_history.title: AI/ML Engineer Intern
work_history.summary: Built and optimized ML and LLM models for real-world tasks. Preprocessed and curated datasets using Python and DVC. Implemented LLM-as-a-Judge (G-Eval) for model evaluation. Applied prompt engineering to improve LLM outputs. Conducted model comparison (ChatGPT vs. Gemini) for emotion detection and insights. Technologies used: Python, DVC, ML frameworks.

work_history.title: Software Developer Intern
work_history.summary: Developed a full-stack e-commerce web app (Aura) using React.js, Node.js. Implemented authentication, product listings, cart, orders, and payment gateway UI. Gained experience in the end-to-end SDLC from planning to deployment. Deployed on Microsoft Azure with stable hosting and database connectivity. Improved performance and reliability using Git, debugging, and optimization. Technologies used: React.js, Node.js, Microsoft Azure, Git.
